visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a bright Costco warehouse setting. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white textured fluffy jacket and a brown dress, stands in front of a glass-door refrigerator. She points enthusiastically at several green boxes of Milo ice cream bars stacked inside. The lighting is cold and even, typical of a retail supermarket environment. (2) The camera moves closer to the product, showing a close-up of the price tag at $299 and the Nestle Milo Magma Stick packaging. A hand reaches in to grab a box, moving it towards the camera lens. (3) The scene cuts to an indoor home environment with soft, warm lighting. Two young women are sitting at a table. One wears a black top while the other wears a black and white zebra-patterned bucket hat with a white apron-style top. The woman in the hat holds a chocolate-coated ice cream bar up to the camera, comparing its width to her fingers. (4) A tight close-up shows the woman in the hat taking a bite of the ice cream. A thick, white milky liquid center begins to flow out of the bitten area. The woman reacts with a wide-eyed, surprised expression, pointing at the flowing filling with her other hand. (5) The two characters continue to eat and talk, showing the ice cream from multiple angles. They use hand gestures like thumbs-up and pointing to emphasize the texture. Colorful, variety-show style text overlays frequently appear around the product and the characters' faces to highlight key features of the food.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 冰淇淋. (2) [Slogan]: 299元 每支24.92. [Subtitle]: 是雀巢美祿的. (3) [Variety]: 超級黑馬. [Subtitle]: 美祿牛奶流心雪糕. (4) [Subtitle]: 回去吃看看究竟是讓妹妹微笑 還是讓妹妹回去痛哭. (5) [Subtitle]: 我們之前開箱 這個很好吃. (6) [Variety]: 冰淇淋. (7) [Slogan]: 牛奶流心雪糕. [Variety]: 一根25塊. [Subtitle]: 大概是兩根指頭的大小. (8) [Subtitle]: 它非常的漂亮 你可以看到它的巧克力 是嵌整根雪糕的. (9) [Subtitle]: 哇牛奶馬上給它流出來 它不是開玩笑哎. (10) [Variety]: !!它真的會流心. (11) [Subtitle]: 整個外面 糕體是冰的 它裡面也做流心. (12) [Subtitle]: 我覺得它這個口感做的很厲害 因為一般外面那個夾餡 通常都是一起結冰的那種餡. (13) [Variety]: 嗯 很好吃. [Subtitle]: 這是我們的第三根. (14) [Variety]: 哈哈哈超級好吃. (15) [Subtitle]: 因為它那個外面呢 巧克力牛奶雪糕 不是那種 非常甜非常濃的那種巧克力. (16) [Subtitle]: 它是有一種帶有那種 餅乾香氣的巧克力 然後它整個糕體啊 嚼起來非常的. (17) [Subtitle]: 有點像是在吃那種冰糕的感覺. (18) [Variety]: 口感很好. [Subtitle]: 中間這個煉乳餡呢 是直接化出來. (19) [Subtitle]: 然後如果你覺得煉乳會太甜的話 我跟你講其實這樣搭著吃 我就非常剛好 完全不會太甜. (20) [Subtitle]: 而且因為它這一根 就只有兩根指頭大小 所以你吃完整個冰棒會非常清爽. (21) [Variety]: 非常快樂. [Subtitle]: 這一根真的是黑馬. (22) [Subtitle]: 這是目前我吃到 最厲害的國外冰棒 非常棒很適合台灣人的 巧克力冰棒.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female characters throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a white fluffy jacket; the other wears a zebra-patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco frozen section with glass refrigerators and green boxes; an indoor residential space with a table and domestic items.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a bright, energetic electronic pop music track with a strong steady beat at approximately 126 BPM. A female voice speaks in a very high-pitched, excited tone in Traditional Chinese, describing a find at Costco. A soft 'pop' UI sound effect is heard as logos appear on screen. (2) A transition occurs with a quick 'whoosh' sound effect. The narrator continues her high-energy speech. A clear 'crunch' sound is audible as she takes a bite of the ice cream, followed by muffled speech as she continues to talk while eating. (3) The background music remains continuous and upbeat. Several 'ding' sound effects trigger as price information and descriptive labels appear. The two female voices interact, with the secondary voice providing shorter, high-valence reactions like 'Wow' and laughter. (4) The audio concludes with a final 'sparkle' or 'pop' sound effect as the speaker gives a high-dominance recommendation, her voice maintaining its bright, enthusiastic contour until the end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Discovery -> Context -> Demonstration -> Sensory Review -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and promote the Milo Magma Stick ice cream bars purchased at Costco, highlighting their 'molten' liquid center and affordable price point through an enthusiastic taste test.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product presentation, price mentioning, and strong positive verbal recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media influencer editing styles with high text density and frequent sound effects to maintain viewer engagement.
